name: Peace Bot
greeting: Hello! I'm Peace Bot, here to help you learn about Peace League Africa and how you can join our mission to build peace across Africa. How can I assist you today?
fallback: I'd love to help with that! For more detailed information, let me connect you with one of our team members who can provide specific guidance.
handoff_message: Let me connect you with a specialist who can help you better. Please hold for a moment while I transfer you.

responses.donate: You can donate via M-Pesa, credit card, bank transfer, or PayPal at peaceleagueafrica.org/donate. All donations are tax-deductible and 95% go directly to programs across 12 African countries.
responses.volunteer: Visit peaceleagueafrica.org/volunteer to apply. We welcome volunteers with skills in teaching, healthcare, communications, IT, and logistics. Opportunities are available across all 12 countries we operate in.
responses.partner: We love partnerships! Visit peaceleagueafrica.org/partner or email partner@peaceleagueafrica.org. We work with NGOs, governments, corporates, and community organizations.
responses.events: Check out peaceleagueafrica.org/events for upcoming summits, workshops, and community gatherings. Most events are free or low-cost. You can register directly on the website.
responses.countries: We operate in 12 African countries: Kenya, Uganda, Rwanda, Tanzania, Ethiopia, DRC, South Sudan, Somalia, Burundi, Mozambique, Madagascar, and Malawi.
responses.mission: Peace League Africa transforms conflict into hope across East Africa and the Great Lakes region. Through peace education in 45+ schools, youth mentorship across 12 countries, and community reconciliation programs.
responses.contact: You can reach us at: Email: info@peaceleagueafrica.org, Phone: +254 700 000 000, Address: Kenda House, Tom Mboya Street, Nairobi, Kenya.
responses.programs: Our programs include: Peace Education (45+ schools), Youth Mentorship (1,200+ volunteers), Community Reconciliation, Healthcare Outreach, Clean Water Projects, and Women Empowerment.
responses.impact: Our impact: 45+ schools with peace education, 12 countries across Africa, 1,200+ active volunteers, 50,000+ lives transformed, and 95% of donations go to programs.
responses.hello: Hello! I'm Peace Bot, here to help you learn about Peace League Africa and how you can join our mission to build peace across Africa. How can I assist you today?
responses.thanks: You're welcome! Is there anything else I can help you with? I'm here to answer questions about our programs, events, donations, or volunteer opportunities.
responses.goodbye: Thank you for your interest in Peace League Africa! Together, we can build a more peaceful world. Have a wonderful day!
responses.price: Our events are typically free or low-cost to ensure accessibility. Some special galas and fundraisers may have ticket prices. Check the specific event page for details.
responses.schedule: Most of our events happen on weekends (Saturday-Sunday). Workshops are usually 1-2 days, summits 2-3 days, and community events are typically single-day affairs.
responses.age: Our programs are open to all ages! Youth programs target ages 12-25, while community programs welcome everyone. Volunteers must be 18+ or have parental consent.
responses.safety: Your safety is our priority. All events follow local health guidelines. For field volunteer programs, we provide safety training, emergency contacts, and insurance coverage.
responses.donate_amount: Any amount helps! $50 trains a peace teacher, $25 provides clean water for a family, $500 launches a youth mentorship program. Every dollar makes a difference.
responses.mpesa: To donate via M-Pesa: Go to Lipa na M-Pesa, Enter Business Number: 123456, Account: Your Phone Number, Amount: Your donation, Enter your M-Pesa PIN. You'll receive a confirmation SMS.
responses.tax: Yes, all donations to Peace League Africa are tax-deductible. We're a registered nonprofit in Kenya. Receipts are sent automatically via email after donation.
responses.refund: We offer refunds within 30 days of donation if requested. Contact info@peaceleagueafrica.org with your receipt for assistance.
responses.sponsor: You can sponsor a child's education for $25/month. This covers school fees, uniforms, books, and meals. Visit peaceleagueafrica.org/donate to set up monthly giving.
responses.corporate: We offer corporate partnership packages including CSR programs, team building volunteer days, branded events, and impact reports. Email partner@peaceleagueafrica.org.
responses.school: Our Peace Education program works with 45+ schools across 8 countries. We train teachers, provide curriculum, and facilitate student peace clubs.
responses.healthcare: Our Healthcare Outreach provides medical camps, health education, and emergency response in remote and conflict-affected areas.
responses.water: Our Clean Water Projects build wells, install water purification systems, and train communities in water management. We've built 100+ wells across Africa.
responses.women: Our Women Empowerment program provides microfinance, vocational training, and leadership development for women in rural communities.
responses.youth: Our Youth Mentorship program pairs young Africans with trained mentors for 12 months, focusing on leadership, conflict resolution, and community service.

agent_personality.tone: warm, helpful, professional, passionate about peace
agent_personality.emoji_usage: moderate - use relevant emojis to convey warmth
agent_personality.response_length: concise - 2-3 sentences unless more detail is needed
